name: brain-hub
description: Register agent work in an evidence-backed temporal knowledge graph and search it from Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Connect Codex work to your private knowledge graph.
interface.longDescription: Brain Hub records goals, decisions, artifacts, evidence, and semantic connections across agent workstreams, then supports anchored hybrid search and graph traversal.
defaultPrompt: Register this workstream in Brain Hub.
Search Brain Hub for related prior decisions.
Continue from this Brain Hub node.
